coverage.detail: 2 of 5 canonical files present; missing decisions.md, _journal, _log/*.md

density.detail: 250 words across state/decisions/config (target 800 for full marks)

freshness.detail: newest knowledge file updated 2 days ago

structure.detail: 4 of 10 artifact kinds present (state, config, threads, skills)

missing.label: No decisions recorded yet — log the choices you make so they stick and shape future advice
No journal yet — it builds itself as you chat (turn on Memory & Context)
No saved sessions yet — your conversations will build a history here
Thin on real content — add your actual documents (statements, records, plans) so advice can be specific

items.label: Most recent filed return
items.recommend: Add your most recent tax return (1040) to data/ — it anchors everything.

items.label: Income documents (W-2 / 1099)
items.recommend: Add this year's W-2 / 1099 income documents.

items.label: Filing status
items.recommend: Record your filing status (single / married filing jointly / etc.).

items.label: Estimated quarterly payments
items.recommend: Track estimated quarterly payments and due dates if you owe them.

items.label: Deductions / credits tracked
items.recommend: Log deductions and credits you're claiming so nothing is left on the table.

items.label: CPA / preparer contact
items.recommend: Save your CPA or preparer's contact details.

items.label: Upcoming tax deadlines
items.recommend: Note the next filing and payment deadlines.
